response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Introductory speech matches the general summary provided in the JSON, but character names were corrected (Ninomae Ina'nis instead of Nanami Inami). Song lyrics provided in the JSON for 'Drawn to Dawn' were not yet present in this instrumental intro segment. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized the JSON for song title identification; discarded irrelevant lyrics as the video ended before the vocal performance began. Performed full manual transcription of the safety rules speech. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal bursts and banter between performers. Included a visual subtitle for the concert title card displayed during the instrumental build-up.

subtitles.original: Yeah! Good morning, afternoon, evening everyone!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Good morning, afternoon, evening everyone!

subtitles.original: This is Ninomae Ina'nis! WOO!
subtitles.english: This is Ninomae Ina'nis! WOO!

subtitles.original: That's right, it is finally time to start Day 2!
subtitles.english: That's right, it is finally time to start Day 2!

subtitles.original: Is everyone hyped!?
subtitles.english: Is everyone hyped!?

subtitles.original: All right, before we kick things off, of course,
subtitles.english: All right, before we kick things off, of course,

subtitles.original: we have some important safety rules and house guidelines to go over.
subtitles.english: we have some important safety rules and house guidelines to go over.

subtitles.original: First, photography and the use of recording equipment
subtitles.english: First, photography and the use of recording equipment

subtitles.original: are strictly prohibited during the performance.
subtitles.english: are strictly prohibited during the performance.

subtitles.original: However, if you are watching from home, screenshots are allowed.
subtitles.english: However, if you are watching from home, screenshots are allowed.

subtitles.original: Please take lots of screenshots!
subtitles.english: Please take lots of screenshots!

subtitles.original: Yeah, スクショはOKですよ！
subtitles.english: Yeah, screenshots are okay!

subtitles.original: Also, the venue is smoke-free, so please refrain from smoking inside.
subtitles.english: Also, the venue is smoke-free, so please refrain from smoking inside.

subtitles.original: Unless you're smoking hot like me!
subtitles.english: Unless you're smoking hot like me!

subtitles.original: Mm, where have I heard that one before? / Someone said that yesterday!
subtitles.english: Mm, where have I heard that one before? / Someone said that yesterday!

subtitles.original: If you start unfeeling- feeling unwell at any point,
subtitles.english: If you start unfeeling- feeling unwell at any point,

subtitles.original: please don't push yourself.
subtitles.english: please don't push yourself.

subtitles.original: Just reach out to the nearest staff member for help.
subtitles.english: Just reach out to the nearest staff member for help.

subtitles.original: And drink water!
subtitles.english: And drink water!

subtitles.original: For everyone's safety, please avoid any dangerous or disruptive behavior.
subtitles.english: For everyone's safety, please avoid any dangerous or disruptive behavior.

subtitles.original: This, once again, no matter how hyped it is,
subtitles.english: This, once again, no matter how hyped it is,

subtitles.original: includes moshing, diving, sitting on shoulders,
subtitles.english: includes moshing, diving, sitting on shoulders,

subtitles.original: jumping excessively, or throwing objects toward the stage.
subtitles.english: jumping excessively, or throwing objects toward the stage.

subtitles.original: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally blocking the aisles,
subtitles.english: Climbing onto the stage, intentionally blocking the aisles,

subtitles.original: or rushing toward the front is also not allowed.
subtitles.english: or rushing toward the front is also not allowed.

subtitles.original: Please refrain from disruptive shouting,
subtitles.english: Please refrain from disruptive shouting,

subtitles.original: erratic lightstick movements, or any extreme motions
subtitles.english: erratic lightstick movements, or any extreme motions

subtitles.original: that might interfere with the experience of those around you.
subtitles.english: that might interfere with the experience of those around you.

subtitles.original: Be considerate.
subtitles.english: Be considerate.

subtitles.original: If you don't follow the instructions of our staff or the venue staff,
subtitles.english: If you don't follow the instructions of our staff or the venue staff,

subtitles.original: you may be asked to leave the venue.
subtitles.english: you may be asked to leave the venue.

subtitles.original: Yeah, please keep in mind that the venue, organizers,
subtitles.english: Yeah, please keep in mind that the venue, organizers,

subtitles.original: performers, and staff cannot be held responsible for any accident,
subtitles.english: performers, and staff cannot be held responsible for any accident,

subtitles.original: equipment damage, or trouble caused by failing to follow instructions.
subtitles.english: equipment damage, or trouble caused by failing to follow instructions.

subtitles.original: I- you stumbled over the same words!
subtitles.english: I- you stumbled over the same words!

subtitles.original: It's hard, okay? I'm trying my best here. I can't read!
subtitles.english: It's hard, okay? I'm trying my best here. I can't read!

subtitles.original: Additionally, any cost for damage resulting from ignoring these rules
subtitles.english: Additionally, any cost for damage resulting from ignoring these rules

subtitles.original: will be the responsibility of the person involved.
subtitles.english: will be the responsibility of the person involved.

subtitles.original: There are cameras in the venue for filming and photography today,
subtitles.english: There are cameras in the venue for filming and photography today,

subtitles.original: and you might appear in the footage or photos.
subtitles.english: and you might appear in the footage or photos.

subtitles.original: These may be used for promotional purposes later on, so please keep that in mind.
subtitles.english: These may be used for promotional purposes later on, so please keep that in mind.

subtitles.original: And finally, just like yesterday, the concert will be in two parts.
subtitles.english: And finally, just like yesterday, the concert will be in two parts.

subtitles.original: There's a part for Wawa and there's a part for me, so please look forward to both of them!
subtitles.english: There's a part for Wawa and there's a part for me, so please look forward to both of them!

subtitles.original: And yeah, that is it for the rules! Woohoo!
subtitles.english: And yeah, that is it for the rules! Woohoo!

subtitles.original: The show is about to begin, so get ready!
subtitles.english: The show is about to begin, so get ready!

subtitles.original: Have fun! Have fun! See you soon! Bye bye!
subtitles.english: Have fun! Have fun! See you soon! Bye bye!

subtitles.original: DRAWN TO DAWN
subtitles.english: [Title: DRAWN TO DAWN]
